    Booking Instructions

    Book your appointment in just a few simple steps

    1

    Select a Doctor

    Choose from your list of doctors or find a new doctor.

    2

    Fill up Form

    Select whether you are new or existing patient, choose schedule, and fill out all the details.

    3

    Enter OTP

    A one-time-pin will be sent to your mobile number to verify your account.

    4

    Booking Fees

    Payment can be done through different payment channels or during consult, depending on the doctor's preference.

    5

    Wait for Confirmation

    Consultation Status will be updated once your request has been confirmed. You'll also be notified through SMS or Email.

    Everything You Need for Your Health

    A comprehensive healthcare platform designed to make your medical journey seamless and stress-free.

    Easy Appointment Booking

    Book appointments with top doctors in just a few taps. Choose between online or in-clinic consultations.

    Real-Time Queue Tracking

    Know your queue position in real-time. No more waiting in crowded clinics.

    Teleconsultation

    Consult with doctors from anywhere via secure video calls. Invite family members to join.

    Digital Prescriptions

    Receive and access your prescriptions digitally. Never lose a prescription again.

    Secure Health Records

    Your medical records are encrypted and securely stored. Access them anytime, anywhere.

    Medicine Delivery

    Order medicines directly from your prescriptions and get them delivered to your doorstep.

    Accepted Payment Methods

    Pay conveniently with your preferred payment method

    COD
    GCash
    Credit Card
